question: The chart shows regional internet usage statistics (2020-2025). Which of the following statements about the regions is supported by the data?

options.A: North America has the highest internet usage percentage among the regions shown.
options.B: Europe has the highest internet usage percentage among the regions shown.
options.C: Africa has higher internet usage than North America.
options.D: Asia Pacific has the highest internet usage percentage among the regions shown.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
